## InnerConceptDataModel.(constructor)

Constructs a new inner concept reference data model from XML.

**Signature:**

```typescript
constructor(xml: DoxygenXmlParser, element: object);
```

## Remarks

Creates a complete inner concept reference data model by parsing the provided XML element. This constructor delegates to the parent class to handle all standard parsing operations for the innerconcept element type, establishing the reference to the contained concept entity.
